title: Database Integration Quiz
description: Test your knowledge about the world of database integration in full-stack engineering.

questions.question: What does CRUD stand for in the context of database operations?
Which type of database is PostgreSQL?
What's the primary benefit of using an ORM like Prisma or Sequelize?
options: It allows you to work with database records as JavaScript objects and provides type-safety.
It's the only way to connect to a database.
It automatically generates a frontend UI for the data.

questions.question: How should you store sensitive database credentials?
options: Directly in your source code files.
In a publicly accessible JSON file.
Using environment variables (e.g., in a .env file).

questions.question: What is connection pooling used for?
options: To collect many databases into a single pool.
To reuse existing database connections and improve performance.
To synchronize data between different database types.
